arcadeAddGamePublishNotice: To publish a game in the official catalog, collaborate on the arborito-games repository on GitHub.
arcadeAddGameSheetHint: Paste the direct game URL (e.g. index.html). For personal use only.
arcadeOfflineDownloadFailed: Could not download offline copy. Check your connection and try again.
arcadeOfflineFirstNotice: Downloads a copy to your device for offline play. Turn it off to delete the copy from disk.
arcadeOfflineOffHint: No local copy: always downloads the latest version
arcadeOfflineOnHint: Copy saved on device; play without internet
arcadeOfflineTapHint: Download a copy for offline play
arcadeAiExperimentalDisclaimer: Dynamic AI is optional, local, and private. Static mode uses author questionnaires only, no model download.
arcadeAiModeDynamicDesc: AI enhances content using challenge schema. Requires AI consent & download.
arcadeAiModeStaticDesc: Fast & private. Uses lesson questionnaires only, no AI or downloads.
arcadeDeleteSaveConfirm: Delete save data for this game?
arcadeDesc: Context-aware educational games. Play games that adapt to what you are learning.
arcadeDisclaimer: Note: This game can use optional AI to create content as you play.
arcadeGardenEmptyDesc: Complete lessons to start cultivating your memory garden.
arcadeModuleNoQuizWarn: This module has no complete lesson questionnaire yet. Add one in at least one lesson (construction mode) or switch to dynamic mode.
arcadeModuleStaticReady: {n} lesson(s) with questionnaires ready for static play.
arcadeSelectModule: Choose which map section to use
arcadePlayScopeLead: The game will use content from:
arcadePlayScopeTap: Tap here to pick another branch or lesson
arcadeStaticNoQuizWarn: No complete questionnaires in this module. Finish a lesson questionnaire or switch to dynamic mode.
arcadeStaticPlayHint: Static mode: {n} lesson(s) with a complete questionnaire in this module.
arcadeWitheredMsg: These lessons are fading from memory. Play to refresh them!
gardenHowtoXp: Every lesson or review gives you lumens ☀️ (your garden currency).
gardenHowtoSeeds: Every module you touch is planted as a seed in your plot.
gardenHowtoCare: If time passes without review, the seed withers 🍂. Reviewing heals it.
gardenHowtoShop: Spend lumens on decorations (butterflies 🦋, mushrooms 🍄, lanterns 🏮) that show up behind the tree.
gardenShopLegend: Buy a decoration and you'll see it animate in the app background.
lumensBadgeHint: Garden currency. Spend it in Arcade → Care.
